# @chester-hill-solutions/scriptkit-call-script-react

React editor and runner for call scripts. Wrap with `ScriptKitCallScriptUiProvider` to inject design-system components.

```tsx
import { ScriptEditor } from "@chester-hill-solutions/scriptkit-call-script-react/editor";
import "@chester-hill-solutions/scriptkit-call-script-react/styles/call-script-tokens.css";
```

Reference: [docs/reference/call-script-api.md](../../docs/reference/call-script-api.md)
